name: io.github.bogdankf1/race-grid
title: Race Grid
description: Public motorsport calendar MCP — 27 racing series (F1, NASCAR, WEC, MotoGP, IndyCar, WRC, IMSA, and more), 2021–2026 seasons. Tools for calendars, next-race lookups, race results, championship standings, circuit metadata, and date-range search.
